content:
#### Problem: Lovable branding still showing
**Solution:**
1. Check [src/index.css](mdc:src/index.css) for branding removal CSS
2. Verify [src/main.tsx](mdc:src/main.tsx) branding removal JavaScript
3. Try production build: `npm run build && npm run preview`

#### Problem: Language dropdown not working
**Solution:**
1. Check if native HTML select is rendering properly
2. Verify languages array in [src/pages/Generate.tsx](mdc:src/pages/Generate.tsx)
3. Test with different browsers
4. Check for memory leaks in MutationObserver

- - [ ] No Lovable branding visible
+ - [ ] Language dropdown working with all options
